Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Requirements -> Core Entities -> APIs -> HLD -> Deep Dives

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. User should be able to register and login

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. User should be able to follow other users

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. User should be able to create posts

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. User should be able to view posts by other followed users

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. User should be able to react or comment on posts

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. Eventual Consistency -> created posts should be visible in feed in about 1 minute

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. High Throughput -> Consider 500 M concurrent users minimum

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Low Latency -> feed should be scrollable and should be visible under 500 ms
